meanings.definition: a sharp explosive sound as from a gunshot or drawing a cork

examples: The cork of the champagne bottle popped

meanings.definition: fire a weapon with a loud explosive noise
cause to make a sharp explosive sound

examples: The farm popped into view as we turned the corner
He suddenly popped up out of nowhere

meanings.definition: put or thrust suddenly and forcefully
examples: pop the pizza into the microwave oven
He popped the petit-four into his mouth
He popped me on the head
He downed three martinis before dinner
She killed a bottle of brandy that night
They popped a few beer after work
The man charged with murder popped a valium to calm his nerves

meanings.definition: cause to burst with a loud, explosive sound
burst open with a sharp, explosive sound
examples: This popcorn pops quickly in the microwave oven
